name: ros2-talker-listener
description: ROS 2 talker/listener demo in Swift (swift-ros2 over CycloneDDS): a std_msgs/String publisher and subscriber as a two-service app group

variables.name: ROS_DOMAIN_ID
variables.description: ROS 2 domain ID for CycloneDDS discovery — talker and listener share it, and it must match any peer ROS 2 node you want to interoperate with
